description: validate + stage configs then finetune the NV-Generate-CTMR MAISI VAE from a CT/MRI NIfTI datalist (CUDA GPU)
rules: datalist must be MONAI-style JSON with non-empty training[] and validation[] or testing[]
each entry has an image path relative to DATA_BASE_DIR; class/modality is ct or mri
requires an NV-Generate-CTMR checkout (set NV_GENERATE_ROOT) with VAE configs + scripts/transforms.py + scripts/utils.py
real training runs adversarially on exactly one CUDA GPU and writes checkpoints under record_store
use --preflight first to validate + stage without launching GPU training
usage: Set DATALIST, DATA_BASE_DIR, and MODALITY (ct|mri). Output: metadata.json (the structured result). Point NV_GENERATE_ROOT at a current NV-Generate-CTMR checkout for staging/training.
limitation: Requires a current upstream NV-Generate-CTMR checkout with VAE configs and helper APIs. Full training needs user CT/MRI NIfTI data, CUDA, and downloaded model weights; it is expensive and not deterministic across hardware/CUDA/package versions. The wrapper gates file accounting and command provenance only — not anatomical realism, reconstruction quality, or downstream model utility. Not for clinical deployment, interpretation, autonomous diagnosis, regulatory submission, or production training-data approval.
